description.text: We help businesses succeed with innovative solutions and dedicated support. Let us help you achieve your goals and take your business to the next level

portfolio.title: OneBook GST
portfolio.subtitle: Smart GST Billing & Accounting UI Design
portfolio.description: A modern UI/UX design conceptualization for a comprehensive GST billing and accounting platform.
fullDescription: The OneBook GST project focused on reimagining the user interface for a complex financial tool. The objective was to strip away the clutter often associated with accounting software and present a clean, approachable design.

Using Figma, we designed a complete visual system that prioritizes clarity and ease of use. We created interactive prototypes to validate user flows, ensuring that even non-technical users could navigate GST billing and inventory management with confidence.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Visual Identity, Design System
portfolio.challenge: Designing a clean, intuitive interface for complex accounting logic that often overwhelms users.
portfolio.solution: Delivered a high-fidelity Figma design kit with a modular system that simplifies financial workflows.

portfolio.title: DivineStone Brand Experience
portfolio.subtitle: Premium Stone & Marble Digital Presence
portfolio.description: A refined digital experience crafted for a premium stone and marble brand, highlighting quality, elegance, and craftsmanship.
fullDescription: DivineStone required a modern and elegant digital presence that reflects the premium quality of their stone and marble products. The challenge was to present a wide product range while maintaining a luxurious and minimal brand aesthetic.

We designed a clean, visually rich website experience focused on high-quality imagery, structured layouts, and smooth navigation. The result is a cohesive brand identity that builds trust and elevates DivineStone’s positioning in the premium construction and interior market.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Website Design, Brand Visual System
portfolio.challenge: The existing online presence lacked a premium feel and did not effectively showcase the quality and variety of stone products.
portfolio.solution: We crafted a modern, image-driven website with a refined design system that emphasizes material textures, product details, and brand elegance.

portfolio.title: On1Tap Billing App
portfolio.subtitle: Smart Billing & Business Management Solution
portfolio.description: A modern billing application designed to simplify invoicing, payments, and business operations for small and medium businesses.
fullDescription: On1Tap is a powerful billing and invoicing application built to help businesses manage their daily transactions with speed and accuracy. The goal was to create a simple yet robust solution that reduces manual work and improves financial tracking.

We designed a clean, intuitive interface with fast workflows for billing, invoice generation, payment tracking, and reports. The platform focuses on performance, usability, and scalability, making it suitable for retailers, service providers, and growing businesses.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, App Development, Performance Optimization
portfolio.challenge: Businesses were relying on manual or outdated billing systems, leading to errors, slow invoicing, and poor financial visibility.
portfolio.solution: We built a fast, user-friendly billing application with automated invoicing, real-time data handling, and a clean dashboard to manage business finances efficiently.

portfolio.title: Digital Poster Maker App
portfolio.subtitle: Creative Poster & Marketing Design Solution
portfolio.description: A user-friendly digital poster maker application designed to help businesses and creators design professional posters quickly and easily.
fullDescription: The Digital Poster Maker App was created to empower businesses, marketers, and content creators to design eye-catching posters without the need for professional design skills. The focus was on simplicity, flexibility, and speed.

We built an intuitive design interface with ready-made templates, drag-and-drop editing, and real-time previews. The app allows users to create promotional posters, social media creatives, and marketing visuals efficiently across devices.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Web App Development, Creative Tooling
portfolio.challenge: Many small businesses and creators lack access to professional design tools, making it difficult to produce high-quality marketing visuals quickly.
portfolio.solution: We developed a simple yet powerful poster maker with customizable templates, drag-and-drop editing, and instant export options, enabling users to create professional designs effortlessly.

portfolio.title: EquityPandit Lite
portfolio.subtitle: Smart Investment Advisor Platform
portfolio.description: A modern investment advisory platform designed to help users make informed stock market decisions with clarity and confidence.
fullDescription: EquityPandit Lite is an investment advisor platform built to simplify stock market analysis for retail investors. The goal was to present complex financial data in a clear, actionable, and user-friendly manner.

We designed a clean and intuitive interface that delivers market insights, stock recommendations, and performance analysis in real time. The platform helps users track opportunities, manage risk, and make smarter investment decisions across devices.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Web App Development, Financial Dashboard Design
portfolio.challenge: Retail investors often struggle with complex financial data, unclear insights, and overwhelming market information.
portfolio.solution: We built a streamlined investment advisory interface that transforms raw market data into clear insights, recommendations, and visual analytics for smarter decision-making.

portfolio.title: TravelNew
portfolio.subtitle: Raise Your Trip Experiences
portfolio.description: An all-in-one social travel platform that helps users create trips, connect with like-minded travelers, and build travel communities.
fullDescription: TravelNew is designed to transform the way people plan and experience trips by focusing on connection, collaboration, and shared interests. Instead of traditional bookings, the platform empowers users to create trips, discover events, and connect with fellow travelers who share similar travel goals.

We built an intuitive mobile-first experience that allows users to explore fairs and festivals, invite friends to trips, join others’ journeys, and grow a vibrant travel community. TravelNew makes trip planning more social, interactive, and enjoyable.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Mobile App Design, Social Platform Development
portfolio.challenge: Travelers often struggle to find companions with similar interests and lack platforms that focus on shared travel experiences rather than bookings.
portfolio.solution: We created a social-first travel platform that enables users to create and join trips, connect with like-minded travelers, explore events, and build travel communities—without being a booking platform.

portfolio.title: Tradz by EquityPandit
portfolio.subtitle: Smart Trading & Market Insights Platform
portfolio.description: A finance-focused trading and market insights platform designed to help users analyze trends, track stocks, and make informed trading decisions.
fullDescription: Tradz by EquityPandit is a modern finance application built for traders and investors who want quick access to market insights and actionable trading information. The platform simplifies complex market data into easy-to-understand visuals and signals.

We designed a mobile-first experience that delivers real-time market updates, stock tracking, and trading insights in a clean and intuitive interface. Tradz helps users stay informed, manage risk, and trade with confidence.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Mobile App Design, Financial Dashboard Development
portfolio.challenge: Traders often face information overload and difficulty interpreting real-time market data on mobile devices.
portfolio.solution: We built a streamlined trading experience with clear data visualization, real-time insights, and an intuitive interface that empowers users to make smarter trading decisions.

portfolio.title: Astrology & Horoscope Platform
portfolio.subtitle: Personalized Astrology & Cosmic Insights
portfolio.description: A modern astrology platform designed to provide personalized horoscope insights, astrological guidance, and spiritual clarity.
fullDescription: This astrology platform was built to help users gain deeper insights into their lives through personalized horoscopes, birth chart analysis, and astrological predictions. The goal was to blend ancient astrological wisdom with a modern digital experience.

We designed a visually rich and intuitive interface that allows users to explore daily horoscopes, zodiac insights, planetary movements, and personalized readings. The platform focuses on clarity, trust, and an engaging user experience across devices.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Web App Development, Astrology Dashboard Design
portfolio.challenge: Users often find astrology content scattered, difficult to understand, and lacking personalization.
portfolio.solution: We created a unified astrology platform that delivers personalized horoscopes, clean visual interpretations, and easy-to-understand astrological insights in a modern, user-friendly interface.

portfolio.title: Tour & Travels Booking Platform
portfolio.subtitle: Smart Travel Planning & Seamless Booking
portfolio.description: A modern tour and travel platform designed to simplify trip planning, bookings, and travel management with a smooth digital experience.
fullDescription: This tour and travels platform was built to help users easily discover destinations, book trips, manage itineraries, and enjoy a seamless travel experience. The goal was to combine convenience, speed, and reliability into a single travel solution.

We designed a visually engaging and user-friendly interface that allows travelers to browse tour packages, book hotels and transport, manage schedules, and access travel details effortlessly across all devices.
portfolio.services: UI/UX Design, Web App Development, Travel Dashboard Design
portfolio.challenge: Travelers often struggle with scattered booking platforms, complex processes, and lack of clear travel information.
portfolio.solution: We developed a centralized travel platform that offers easy bookings, clear itineraries, real-time updates, and a smooth user experience for travelers and travel agencies.

faqs.question: What is the cost of mobile app development?
faqs.answer: Costs vary based on features, complexity, and platform. Contact us for a detailed quote.

items.name: FinTech
items.description: Digital banking, payments, and financial solutions that power the future of finance
items.longDescription: We help financial institutions and startups build secure, scalable, and compliant financial technology solutions. From mobile banking apps to complex trading platforms, our team delivers cutting-edge fintech products that meet regulatory requirements while providing exceptional user experiences.

features.title: Digital Banking Solutions
features.description: Full-featured mobile and web banking platforms with account management, transfers, and bill payments

features.title: Payment Gateway Integration
features.description: Seamless integration with Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay, and custom payment processors

features.title: Blockchain & Cryptocurrency
features.description: Crypto wallets, DeFi platforms, NFT marketplaces, and smart contract development

features.title: Investment & Trading Platforms
features.description: Stock trading apps, robo-advisors, and portfolio management systems

features.title: KYC/AML Compliance

features.title: Financial Analytics & Reporting
features.description: Real-time dashboards, financial forecasting, and regulatory reporting tools

benefits.title: Bank-Grade Security
benefits.description: 256-bit encryption, multi-factor authentication, and SOC 2 compliance

benefits.title: Lightning-Fast Transactions
benefits.description: Sub-second transaction processing with 99.99% success rate

benefits.title: Regulatory Compliance
benefits.description: Built-in compliance with PCI-DSS, GDPR, PSD2, and local regulations

benefits.title: Infinitely Scalable
benefits.description: Handle millions of users and transactions without performance degradation

caseStudies.title: NeoBank Mobile App
caseStudies.description: Built a complete digital banking platform with 500K+ users in first year

faqs.question: How do you ensure PCI-DSS compliance?
faqs.answer: We follow PCI-DSS Level 1 standards including encrypted data storage, secure transmission protocols, regular security audits, and tokenization of sensitive card data. Our infrastructure is hosted on PCI-compliant cloud providers.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with existing banking core systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have experience integrating with major core banking systems like Temenos, Finastra, and FIS. We also work with open banking APIs and can build custom middleware for legacy system integration.

faqs.question: What's the typical timeline for a fintech app?
faqs.answer: A basic fintech app takes 4-6 months, while complex platforms with trading features, multiple payment integrations, and regulatory compliance typically take 8-12 months.

items.name: HealthTech
items.description: HIPAA-compliant healthcare apps, telemedicine platforms, and medical solutions
items.longDescription: We partner with healthcare providers, hospitals, and health-tech startups to build secure, patient-centric digital health solutions. Our team understands the complexities of healthcare regulations and creates platforms that improve patient outcomes while streamlining clinical workflows.

features.title: Telemedicine Platforms
features.description: HD video consultations, virtual waiting rooms, e-prescriptions, and follow-up scheduling

features.title: EHR/EMR Integration
features.description: Seamless integration with Epic, Cerner, Allscripts, and HL7 FHIR-based systems

features.title: Patient Portals
features.description: Appointment booking, medical records access, lab results, and secure messaging

features.title: Remote Patient Monitoring
features.description: IoT device integration, vital signs tracking, and automated alerts for caregivers

features.title: Health Analytics
features.description: Population health insights, clinical decision support, and outcomes tracking

features.title: Mental Health Solutions
features.description: Therapy platforms, mood tracking, CBT tools, and crisis intervention features

benefits.title: HIPAA & HITECH Compliant
benefits.description: End-to-end encryption, audit logs, BAA agreements, and regular security assessments

benefits.title: Improved Patient Outcomes
benefits.description: Better engagement, medication adherence, and continuity of care

benefits.title: Clinical Workflow Efficiency
benefits.description: Reduce administrative burden by 40% with automated documentation and scheduling

benefits.title: Interoperability Ready
benefits.description: HL7 FHIR, SMART on FHIR, and seamless EHR integration capabilities

caseStudies.title: TeleHealth Platform
caseStudies.description: Built a telemedicine platform serving 50+ clinics across 3 states

faqs.question: How do you handle HIPAA compliance?
faqs.answer: We implement HIPAA compliance at every layer - encrypted data at rest and in transit, role-based access controls, comprehensive audit logging, signed BAA with cloud providers, and regular third-party security audits.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with our existing EHR system?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience integrating with Epic, Cerner, Allscripts, athenahealth, and other major EHR systems using HL7 v2, HL7 FHIR, and proprietary APIs.

faqs.question: Do you support FDA-regulated medical devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow FDA 21 CFR Part 11 guidelines for software as a medical device (SaMD) and can help with the FDA 510(k) submission process.

items.name: EdTech
items.description: Learning management systems, virtual classrooms, and educational platforms
items.longDescription: We create engaging, accessible, and effective learning experiences for educational institutions, corporate training, and ed-tech startups. From K-12 to higher education and professional development, our platforms make learning more interactive and measurable.

features.title: Learning Management Systems
features.description: Course creation, content library, assignments, grading, and progress tracking

features.title: Live Virtual Classrooms
features.description: HD video classes, screen sharing, whiteboard, breakout rooms, and recording

features.title: Interactive Content
features.description: Quizzes, simulations, AR/VR experiences, and gamified learning modules

features.title: Assessment & Proctoring
features.description: Online exams, AI-powered proctoring, plagiarism detection, and auto-grading

features.title: Student Analytics
features.description: Learning analytics, at-risk student identification, and outcome predictions

features.title: Mobile Learning
features.description: Offline access, push notifications, microlearning, and progress sync

benefits.title: Higher Engagement
benefits.description: Gamification and interactive content increase course completion by 60%

benefits.title: Learn Anywhere
benefits.description: Mobile-first design with offline support for learning on the go

benefits.title: Personalized Learning
benefits.description: AI-driven recommendations and adaptive learning paths

benefits.title: Actionable Insights
benefits.description: Real-time analytics to identify struggling students and optimize content

caseStudies.title: Corporate LMS Platform
caseStudies.description: Built a corporate training platform for Fortune 500 companies

faqs.question: Can you integrate with existing SIS/LMS systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we support LTI 1.3, xAPI (Tin Can), SCORM 1.2/2004, and can integrate with Canvas, Blackboard, Moodle, and major Student Information Systems.

faqs.question: How do you handle large-scale live classes?
faqs.answer: Our virtual classroom solution supports up to 10,000 concurrent viewers using WebRTC for small groups and HLS streaming for large broadcasts, with automatic quality adaptation.

faqs.question: Is the content accessible for students with disabilities?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines, support screen readers, provide closed captions, keyboard navigation, and work with accessibility consultants for compliance.

items.name: eCommerce
items.description: Custom online stores, marketplaces, and omnichannel retail solutions
items.longDescription: We build high-converting eCommerce experiences that drive sales and customer loyalty. From D2C brands to multi-vendor marketplaces, our solutions handle everything from product discovery to fulfillment, integrated with your existing business systems.

features.title: Custom Storefronts
features.description: Headless commerce, PWA storefronts, and mobile-optimized shopping experiences

features.title: Multi-Vendor Marketplace

features.title: Inventory & Order Management

benefits.title: Higher Conversions

benefits.title: Global Reach

benefits.title: Operational Efficiency

benefits.title: Customer Insights

caseStudies.title: Fashion Marketplace
caseStudies.description: Built a multi-vendor fashion marketplace with 500+ sellers

faqs.question: Should we build custom or use Shopify/WooCommerce?
faqs.answer: For most D2C brands, Shopify with custom theme and apps is cost-effective. Custom builds are ideal for marketplaces, complex B2B scenarios, or when you need full control over the tech stack.

faqs.question: How do you handle high-traffic sales events?
faqs.answer: We implement auto-scaling infrastructure, CDN caching, queue-based order processing, and load testing to handle 10x normal traffic during flash sales and Black Friday events.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with our ERP and warehouse systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have experience integrating with SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, and major 3PL providers like ShipBob, Deliverr, and custom warehouse management systems.

items.name: SaaS
items.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with subscription billing and enterprise features
items.longDescription: We help entrepreneurs and businesses build successful SaaS products from MVP to scale. Our team brings deep expertise in multi-tenant architecture, subscription management, and the technical challenges unique to SaaS businesses.

features.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
features.description: Secure data isolation, tenant-specific customization, and efficient resource sharing

features.title: Subscription & Billing
features.description: Usage-based pricing, trials, upgrades, and integration with Stripe, Chargebee

features.title: User & Team Management
features.description: SSO, RBAC, team workspaces, and enterprise user provisioning (SCIM)

features.title: API & Integrations
features.description: RESTful/GraphQL APIs, webhooks, and marketplace for third-party integrations

features.title: White-Label Solutions
features.description: Custom branding, domains, and reseller/partner program support

features.title: Analytics & Metrics
features.description: Usage analytics, feature adoption tracking, and churn prediction

benefits.title: Rapid Time-to-Market
benefits.description: Launch your MVP in 8-12 weeks with our SaaS accelerator framework

benefits.title: Built to Scale
benefits.description: Architecture that grows from 100 to 100,000 users without rewrites

benefits.title: Enterprise Ready
benefits.description: SSO, audit logs, compliance features, and SLA guarantees

benefits.title: Predictable Revenue
benefits.description: Subscription management and retention features to grow MRR

caseStudies.title: HR Management Platform
caseStudies.description: Built an HR SaaS platform from MVP to $2M ARR

faqs.question: How do you handle multi-tenancy?
faqs.answer: We typically use a shared database with tenant isolation at the application layer (row-level security) for cost efficiency, or dedicated databases for enterprise clients with strict compliance requirements.

faqs.question: What's included in enterprise readiness?
faqs.answer: SSO (SAML, OIDC), SCIM user provisioning, audit logs, custom contracts/SLAs, dedicated support, and compliance certifications (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA if needed).

faqs.question: How do you approach MVP vs full product?
faqs.answer: We use a phased approach: 8-12 weeks for a validated MVP with core features, then iterate based on user feedback. This reduces risk and ensures you're building what customers actually want.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with legacy policy admin systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we've integrated with Guidewire, Duck Creek, Majesco, and custom legacy systems. We can build modern front-ends while connecting to existing back-office systems.

faqs.question: How do you handle state-specific regulations?
faqs.answer: Our platforms support multi-state operations with configurable rules engines for state-specific forms, rates, and filing requirements.

faqs.question: What about data security and compliance?
faqs.answer: We implement SOC 2 controls, encrypt all PII, maintain audit logs, and can support specific requirements like NAIC data security model law compliance.

caseStudies.description: Built a niche professional network for 200K+ designers

faqs.question: How do you handle content moderation at scale?
faqs.answer: We implement a combination of AI-powered automated moderation, community reporting, human review queues, and configurable community guidelines with escalation workflows.

faqs.question: Can the platform handle millions of users?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design for scale from day one using microservices, database sharding, CDN caching, and real-time infrastructure that can handle millions of concurrent users.

faqs.question: What about user safety and privacy?
faqs.answer: We implement blocking, muting, content filtering, privacy controls, data export (GDPR), and work with trust & safety consultants for comprehensive protection.

items.name: Travel & Hospitality
items.description: Booking platforms, travel apps, and hospitality management solutions
items.longDescription: We help travel companies, OTAs, and hospitality businesses create seamless booking experiences. From flight search to hotel management, our solutions handle complex inventory, pricing, and booking workflows.

features.title: Flight & Hotel Search

faqs.question: Which GDS and suppliers do you integrate with?
faqs.answer: We integrate with Amadeus, Sabre, Travelport for flights, and major hotel APIs like Booking.com, Expedia, Hotelbeds, plus direct hotel connections via channel managers.

faqs.question: How do you handle multi-currency and localization?
faqs.answer: Our platforms support 50+ currencies with real-time exchange rates, localized content, RTL languages, and region-specific payment methods.

faqs.question: What about cancellations and refunds?
faqs.answer: We implement automated cancellation policies based on supplier rules, refund processing, travel insurance integration, and dispute management workflows.

items.name: Food & Restaurant
items.description: Food delivery apps, restaurant POS, and kitchen management systems
items.longDescription: We help restaurants, cloud kitchens, and food delivery startups streamline operations and enhance customer experience. From online ordering to kitchen display systems, our solutions optimize every aspect of the food service business.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with existing POS systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we integrate with Square, Toast, Clover, and can build custom integrations with legacy POS systems via their APIs or middleware.

faqs.question: How do you handle delivery logistics?
faqs.answer: We can integrate with third-party delivery fleets (DoorDash Drive, Uber Direct) or build in-house fleet management with driver apps, auto-dispatch, and route optimization.

faqs.question: What about multi-location restaurant chains?
faqs.answer: Our platform supports centralized menu management, location-specific pricing, consolidated reporting, and role-based access for franchise or chain operations.

faqs.question: How do you approach custom projects?
faqs.answer: We start with a thorough discovery phase to understand your business, challenges, and goals. Then we create a detailed proposal with architecture, timeline, and phased delivery plan.

faqs.question: What if we're not sure what we need?
faqs.answer: That's common! We offer paid discovery workshops where we work with your team to define requirements, create prototypes, and validate ideas before committing to full development.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible support and maintenance packages including bug fixes, security updates, feature enhancements, and 24/7 monitoring for critical systems.
